title: OpenAI loses $34 billion in 2025 and its market share falls below 50% for the first time
summary: The artificial intelligence company burns money on its most advanced models while competitors like Anthropic and DeepSeek gain ground.

title: SpaceX buys Cursor for $60 billion to compete in artificial intelligence
summary: Elon Musk's aerospace company acquires the AI platform Cursor in a deal that combines shares after its IPO.

title: Anthropic keeps its Fable model offline due to disagreements with the US government
summary: The AI company refuses to comply with the government's security demands, which considers its model a risk, as the debate on AI regulation intensifies.

title: Department of Justice defends xAI's unauthorized gas turbines for national security
summary: In a lawsuit by the NAACP, the government argues that the turbines are vital for the country's energy security.

title: Countries like the United Kingdom and Spain advance in banning social media for minors under 16
summary: Age verification systems and access restrictions will be implemented to protect minors online.

title: Tech companies blame AI for layoffs while restructuring their teams
summary: Robinhood, Microsoft, and Meta face criticism for using artificial intelligence as an excuse to reduce staff, while the impact on employment sparks debate.

title: Microsoft closes Ninja Theory and restructures Xbox in a major 'reset' of its video game division
summary: The head of Xbox Game Studios leaves the company, studios are closed, and external funding is sought for new projects.

title: Spain approves a €719 million investment to build an artificial intelligence gigafactory
summary: The project, located between Madrid and Tarragona, aims to position the country as a leader in AI infrastructure.

title: Meta launches AI mode on Facebook that searches public information across all its platforms
summary: The new AI-powered search feature is rolling out globally to compete with other social networks.

title: Google Earth debuts a global flight simulator and adds professional features
summary: The tool now allows you to fly over any place in the world with an enhanced immersive experience.

title: Fox buys Roku for $22 billion in cash and stock
summary: The deal consolidates the streaming market, combining Fox's content with Roku's platform.

title: Chinese hackers use Google Workspace rules to steal defense and research emails
summary: The group UNC6508 exploited security configurations to access sensitive information from government institutions.

title: The end of the war with Iran will have a high economic cost for the United States
summary: Analysts warn that the peace agreement will involve multi-million dollar payments to Iran, while consumers prepare for changes in prices.

title: ByteDance and Neuralink bet on manufacturing their own custom chips
summary: The TikTok company develops its own CPU, while Neuralink changes manufacturer for its next-generation brain chips.

title: Samsung and Valve unveil new high-performance computing devices
summary: Samsung launches the Galaxy Book6 Edge laptop with ARM processor, and the Steam Machine with SteamOS appears in performance tests.

title: New techniques and products revolutionize espresso preparation
summary: From cold drinks without a machine to ultrasound to improve extraction, coffee experiences a wave of innovation.

title: Google Chrome will update its browser to block popular ad blockers
summary: The new version of the browser will limit extensions that interfere with ads, affecting millions of users.

title: India temporarily bans Telegram over exam fraud concerns
summary: The Indian government orders the blocking of the messaging app for its use in leaking exams.

title: DeepSeek receives external funding for the first time at a $50 billion valuation
summary: The Chinese AI startup attracts external investors in a historic round for the sector.

title: Salesforce acquires Fin for $3.6 billion for its AI agent platform
summary: The acquisition of the AI agent startup strengthens Salesforce's offering in business automation.
